overview.description: Demonstration of positive test for PostgresDB
overview.name: Positive PostgresDB Test

http.comment: Check ability to get empty list of news

postgres.comment: Check ability to get empty list of news

migrate.comment: Check ability to migrate test dataset
migrate.name: POSTGRES

postgres.comment: Check ability to get new news data with SQL query

http.comment: Check ability to get new news data with HTTP query

postgres.comment: Check ability to make INSERT query into the DB
postgres.query: INSERT INTO news (id, newsname, newsnumber, active, createdat) VALUES (104, 'News4', 4, false, '2023-04-21 10:49:02.491000')

http.comment: Check ability to post new news with HTTP query

var.comment: Creating variable with id of previous command
var.name: newsId

postgres.comment: Check ability to get news added with INSERT and HTTP queries

postgres.query: DELETE FROM news WHERE active = false

postgres.comment: Checking that that records were deleted
postgres.query: SELECT * FROM news WHERE active = false

postgres.comment: Check ability to conduct UPDATE query
postgres.query: UPDATE news SET newsname = 'NewsWithVar' WHERE id = {{newsId}}

http.comment: Check ability to get news by name with updated name

postgres.comment: Check ability to get updated news name
postgres.query: SELECT newsname, newsnumber FROM news WHERE id = {{newsId}}

postgres.comment: Check ability to conduct 4 query within one command
postgres.query: INSERT INTO news (id, newsname, newsnumber, active, createdat) VALUES (100, 'News10', 10, true, '2023-04-21 10:49:02.491000')
SELECT * FROM news WHERE newsnumber = 10 ORDER BY id
UPDATE news SET newsnumber = 11 WHERE newsname = 'News10'
